subcodes.first_line: O Niyaz! Upon thee be the glory of the Luminary of Hijaz, through Whom truth was made manifest and the traces of metaphor were obliterated [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا نیاز علیک بهاء نیر الحجاز الذی به ظهر الحقیقه و محت آثار المجاز قد کنا ما
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God
